name: FILTER GLOW
conditioned_path: filter face-transform (IG/TikTok beauty filters that smooth, enlarge, and glow-up the face)
mechanic: A face sits in frame; every tap stacks another random filter layer (smooth, saturate, enlarge eyes, jaw-sharpen). Keep tapping to pile on vanity transforms until the face glitches and 'breaks' — the score is how many layers you stacked before it shatters.
video_trick: vanity arms-race (invented) — push the filter to absurdity, the break is the punchline

name: GRID CURATE
conditioned_path: aesthetic-grid curation (the IG profile 3x3 grid people agonize over for color harmony)
mechanic: A 3x3 profile grid fills with random photo tiles; tap any two to swap them. A live harmony meter reads the color balance of the grid — chase the highest harmony % you can before you lock it.

name: DRAFT COURAGE
conditioned_path: posting anxiety + the drafts folder (the hover-before-post hesitation)
mechanic: A 'Post' button glows; press and hold to build courage — a meter rises. Release inside the green zone to actually post and bank it; release too early or too late and it dumps to Drafts and you score nothing. Each round the green zone shrinks.

name: STORY CATCH
conditioned_path: stories 24h FOMO (the story bar of decaying rings you scramble to watch before they expire)
mechanic: A row of story bubbles drifts in, each with a 24h ring depleting around it. Tap each ring at peak brightness (full ring) to 'catch' it; tap too late and it expires and breaks your combo. Speed ramps as rings appear faster.
video_trick: FOMO catch (invented) — the ring is draining, catch it before it's gone

name: DUET SYNC
conditioned_path: duet/remix (the TikTok split-screen duet where you answer the other half on beat)
mechanic: The left half of the screen plays a beat pattern; the right half is yours. Tap your half to lay your hits so they land exactly in the gaps of the left beat. A sync meter scores how tightly your half locks into theirs.

name: DOUBLE-TAP RUSH
conditioned_path: double-tap like (the IG muscle-memory double-tap that fires a heart animation)
mechanic: A feed scrolls upward; photo cards stream past and you double-tap each one to drop a heart on it. The double-tap is the whole verb — clean doubles score, sloppy single-taps miss. Hearts pile up as a visible like-count you're racing to grow.

name: SAVE OR LOSE
conditioned_path: saved/bookmark posts (the IG ribbon for save-for-later, hoarded against a felt scarcity)
mechanic: Cards drift down a feed; tap the bookmark ribbon on the ones worth saving — but your Saves slot has limited capacity. Fill it and a card you wanted slips past unsaved. The compulsion is choosing what's worth keeping under a hard cap.

name: POLL PREDICT
conditioned_path: story sticker poll (the two-option poll you vote on to see which side wins)
mechanic: A story poll appears with two options and a live results bar creeping toward the majority. Tap your pick before the timer ends; you score only if you predicted the winning side. Streak builds across consecutive correct predictions.

name: ACTIVE DOT
conditioned_path: seen-receipt / active-now green dot (the anticipation of catching someone online)
mechanic: A DM-style contact list scrolls; most dots are grey, but one flickers green for a brief window. Tap the green dot in its window to 'catch them online' — miss it and they go back to grey. The green windows get shorter and rarer.

name: FYP TRAIN
conditioned_path: FYP 'not interested' training (the long-press-to-dismiss feed-shaping god-complex)
mechanic: Thumbnails stream in labeled with topic tags; long-press to mark 'not interested' and tap to keep. Your feed purity score rises as you weed out the off-topic ones — but misjudge and you nuke a good topic. Race to the cleanest FYP in 60s.
video_trick: algorithm god-complex (invented) — you are the algorithm, shape the feed

name: LIKE GUESS
conditioned_path: like-count hiding (the IG 'hidden likes' curiosity that makes you want to know the number)
mechanic: A post appears with its like-count blurred out; a slider lets you guess the number, then the blur clears. Score by how close your guess lands — within 1% is a perfect. Streak across posts; the counts get weirder each round.

name: REPOST CHAIN
conditioned_path: repost/regram (the chain-posted meme that lives only if someone keeps reposting it)
mechanic: A post travels along a conveyor; tap the repost button the instant it crosses the trigger line to pass it forward. Each clean repost extends the chain; a mistimed tap breaks it and the chain dies. The conveyor speeds up as the chain grows.

name: TAG EVERYONE
conditioned_path: tagging people in photos (the IG compulsion to tag every face before the post feels complete)
mechanic: A group photo shows faces as glowing target dots; tap each face to tag it before the upload timer runs out. Missed faces are 'untagged' and the post stays incomplete — tag them all for a clean upload, the count of faces grows each round.

name: FILTER RESTORE
conditioned_path: filter face-transform (the same beauty-filter conditioning, inverted toward the real face)
mechanic: A face starts buried under stacked filters (smooth, saturated, enlarged). Tap gently to peel one filter layer at a time, breathing back toward the unedited face. When the natural face is fully restored, the screen softly settles and the session ends.

name: GRID BREATHE
conditioned_path: aesthetic-grid curation (the same grid-conditioning, freed from judgment)
mechanic: A 3x3 grid of soft color tiles; tap any two to swap them at your own pace. No meter scores you — when the grid feels balanced to you, it gently locks and pulses once with your breath, then rests. Curation without a verdict.

name: DRAFTS RELEASE
conditioned_path: posting anxiety + the drafts folder (the hoard of unposted thoughts, inverted to letting go)
mechanic: A stack of 'draft' cards (half-written thoughts) sits on screen; swipe each one gently upward and it dissolves with a soft exhale. No posting, no saving — just releasing the pressure to say it. The session ends when the drafts are clear.

name: STORY SET
conditioned_path: stories 24h FOMO (the same story-ring conditioning, without the scramble)
mechanic: A row of story bubbles with depleting rings sits on screen; you don't race them. Each ring empties on its own and the bubble fades with a soft chime; tap one only to acknowledge it before it goes. It's okay that they expire — you watch them settle and the bar empties.

name: ARCHIVE WALK
conditioned_path: memory/archive 'on this day' (the IG archive recap, without the recomputation anxiety)
mechanic: A slow vertical scroll through your 'archive' — soft dated photo cards drift up one at a time. The scroll is pace-locked so you can't rush; each card lingers, then passes. The walk has a last card and a gentle close. Memory as a stroll, not a feed.

name: BREATH FILTER
conditioned_path: filter face-transform (the reach for a filter, replaced by the breath as the only 'adjustment')
mechanic: Hold the screen to inhale — the color temperature warms and the image clarifies; release to exhale and it cools and softens. There is no face to fix; the 'filter' is your own breath cycling the screen. Pace it slowly; the session closes after several breaths.

name: SAVE BOX
conditioned_path: saved/bookmark posts (the save-for-later ribbon, without the storage scarcity)
mechanic: Soft cards drift across the screen; tap a card to lift it gently into a keepsake box at the bottom. There is no capacity limit and no urgency — each save lands with a quiet chime. Keep what matters; the box fills at whatever pace you choose.

name: POLL NO STAKES
conditioned_path: story sticker poll (the two-option vote, without majority pressure or a wrong answer)
mechanic: A gentle poll appears ('tea or coffee', 'morning or night'); tap either option and the bar softly reveals both sides — no winner, no score, just your pick noted. Each poll fades into the next at a slow, even pace. Opinion without competition.

name: PROFILE SETTLE
conditioned_path: profile picture / glow-up editing (the endless profile-polish, inverted to done)
mechanic: An avatar sits with filter effects slowly spinning around it (polish, glow, sharpen). Hold still and the effects gradually calm and fall away, settling into one quiet resting portrait. When it's still, the session closes — you're done, you can stop editing.

name: UNFOLLOW QUIET
conditioned_path: following list / mute-unfollow (the curation of who fills your feed, toward less noise)
mechanic: A grid of noisy tiles (loud colors, buzzing labels) fills the screen; tap a tile to gently unfollow it and it fades to calm. The screen audibly quiets as you remove noise — no score, just the relief of a calmer field. Stop whenever it feels quiet enough.

name: MEMORY JAR
conditioned_path: memory/archive feature (the 'save a memory' instinct, as gentle accumulation not recap anxiety)
mechanic: Hold the screen and a glass jar slowly fills with soft glowing memory-motes rising from below; release and the motes settle gently to the bottom. Fill it at your own breath pace — there's no quota and the jar never overflows. Accumulation as rest.

name: CAPTION REST
conditioned_path: caption-writing anxiety (the blank caption field and the pressure to say it right)
mechanic: A blank caption field with a softly blinking cursor; you don't type. Hold the screen and the 'right words' surface as a gentle fade — read them, then the post button stays disabled and the thought simply dissolves. The caption was enough; it never needed to publish.
